title: hieracium schmidtii subsp. nebrodense
intro: Hieracium schmidtii subsp. nebrodense, also known as the Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium schmidtii subsp. nebrodense can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and other minor health issues.
